name: Anatomy
description: Gross anatomy, embryology, histology, and neuroanatomy

name: Physiology
description: Organ system physiology and cellular mechanisms

name: Pathology
description: General and systemic pathology, laboratory medicine

name: Microbiology
description: Bacteriology, virology, mycology, parasitology, and immunology

name: Internal Medicine
description: Diagnosis and management of adult diseases

name: Surgery
description: Surgical principles, trauma, and operative management

name: Pediatrics
description: Growth, development, and pediatric disease management

name: Obstetrics and Gynecology
description: Pregnancy, labor, reproductive health, and gynecologic disorders

name: Psychiatry
description: Mental health disorders, psychopharmacology, and behavioral science

name: Emergency Medicine
description: Acute care, resuscitation, and emergency procedures

name: Biostatistics
description: Study design, statistical analysis, and evidence-based medicine

name: Epidemiology
description: Disease distribution, outbreak investigation, and population health

name: Ethics
description: Medical ethics principles, informed consent, and end-of-life issues

name: Patient Safety
description: Quality improvement, error prevention, and healthcare systems
